sections.heading: Crochet Calculator | Free Yarn, Gauge, Pricing & Time Calculator
sections.content: Use this crochet calculator to estimate yarn yardage, project cost, time, gauge adjustments, stitch counts, and pricing for any crochet project from blankets and hats to sweaters and commission work.

sections.heading: How to Use This Calculator
sections.content: Enter your values in the calculator above and click calculate to see instant results. Adjust inputs to compare scenarios and find the option that fits your needs.

faq.question: What does the Crochet Calculator | Free Yarn, Gauge, Pricing & Time Calculator do?
faq.answer: Use this crochet calculator to estimate yarn yardage, project cost, time, gauge adjustments, stitch counts, and pricing for any crochet project from blankets and hats to sweaters and commission work.

faq.question: Is this calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes. Smart Calculator tools are free, work in your browser, and require no signup.
